evals.name: specified_technical_article
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/React 19 编译器笔记.md 整理成一篇 Obsidian 成品笔记，必要时补齐最新官方来源。
evals.expected_output: Creates one polished Obsidian Markdown note in 06_To_Classify, follows obsidian-markdown syntax, preserves useful examples/procedures/caveats while compressing noise, includes Sources only if external sources are used, then moves the specified Inbox raw input to the Obsidian trash after all checks pass.
expectations: The source file is explicitly specified.
The output is written to 06_To_Classify.
The final note is a refined knowledge page, not a terse outline.
A concise opening summary is allowed but does not replace reusable body detail.
The note structure is chosen based on the material rather than fixed headings.
Version-dependent, conflicting, or incomplete facts may be checked against official or primary sources.
Sources appears only if external sources are used.
The finished note does not add 00_Inbox paths to frontmatter, body links, wikilinks, or Sources.
vault_integrity check --strict and delete-check --strict pass before deletion.
The specified Inbox input is moved to the Obsidian trash, not permanently deleted.

evals.name: ambiguous_input_must_ask
evals.prompt: 帮我把 Inbox 里刚才那篇文章整理成 Obsidian 成品笔记。
evals.expected_output: Asks for the exact source path instead of scanning 00_Inbox or guessing the current target.
expectations: The agent does not guess which file to process.
The agent asks for the exact source path.
No note is created until the input is specified.
No source deletion is attempted.

evals.name: messy_multi_source_refinement
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/会议记录-产品定位.md 和 00_Inbox/用户访谈摘录.md 整理成一篇项目相关成品笔记，原文结构很乱，可以重组。
evals.expected_output: Creates one polished note in 06_To_Classify, reorganizes messy multi-source material into a readable structure, preserves decisions and caveats, and avoids fixed body templates.
expectations: The output is one main note in 06_To_Classify.
The note can reorganize the original order when that improves readability.
The note preserves useful decisions, caveats, observations, and unresolved private context.
The note absorbs the specified Inbox materials without creating durable references back to 00_Inbox paths.
Both sources are moved to the Obsidian trash only after all deletion preflights pass.
No fixed body template is imposed.
The final note follows obsidian-markdown syntax.

evals.name: long_high_signal_prompt_material
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/Midjourney 提示词工程资料.md 整理成可长期复用的知识笔记。原材料很长，有大量规则、例子、参数、失败修正和版本差异。
evals.expected_output: Creates one substantial Midjourney knowledge note in 06_To_Classify that merges duplicates, preserves valuable rules/examples/parameter guidance/failure fixes, optionally adds current official-source corrections when useful, and avoids information-loss compression.
expectations: The default output is one main note in 06_To_Classify.
Long high-signal inputs are not reduced to a short outline unless the source is genuinely low signal.
The agent preserves unique reusable source units and compresses only duplicates, noise, boilerplate, or superseded claims.
The output does not use the temporary 00_Inbox input path as provenance in frontmatter, body links, or Sources.
Examples, prompt templates, parameters, and failure corrections are retained or intentionally merged.
Long but valuable examples may be kept in folded callouts, tables, code blocks, or appendix-like sections instead of being deleted.
Version differences and current-source corrections are explicit when search is used.
Visual or structured aids such as parameter matrices, workflow diagrams, callouts, or before/after prompt examples are allowed when useful but not required.
Repeated content is consolidated without losing important details.

evals.name: image_links_conditional_path
evals.prompt: 整理 00_Inbox/ComfyUI 截图流程笔记.md，里面有大量远程图片链接，图片本身有信息价值。
evals.expected_output: Creates one polished note in 06_To_Classify, localizes every useful source image under 05_Attachments/<note-slug>/, and embeds each image with an explanation or caption before source deletion.
expectations: The final note is written to 06_To_Classify.
Every useful source image is saved under 05_Attachments/<note-slug>/ and embedded near the relevant explanation.
Raster images are optimized with scripts/optimize_images.py when that preserves their value; otherwise a local original is embedded.
Source deletion occurs only after local asset paths and embeds validate.
Embeds use Obsidian wikilink embed syntax rather than absolute filesystem paths.
Decorative or inaccessible images are not silently treated as local attachments.

evals.name: no_images_skip_image_workflow
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/纯文本读书摘录.md 整理成一篇 Obsidian 成品笔记，原材料没有图片。
evals.expected_output: Creates one polished note in 06_To_Classify and skips image handling entirely.
expectations: The final note is written to 06_To_Classify.
No image localization or optimization workflow is entered.
No decorative image is fetched or generated.
The note remains readable and structured without forcing visual assets.

evals.name: sources_only_when_external_used
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/个人复盘草稿.md 整理成一篇成品笔记，不需要查外部来源。
evals.expected_output: Creates one polished note in 06_To_Classify without a Sources section, because no web search or external enrichment was used.
expectations: The final note is written to 06_To_Classify.
No web search is performed when it is not useful.
Sources is omitted when no external sources are used.
The specified 00_Inbox input is not treated as an external source and is not cited in Sources or frontmatter.
The note can still include frontmatter, H1, and substantive body sections.

evals.name: web_search_for_version_conflict
evals.prompt: 整理 00_Inbox/OpenAI API 迁移笔记.md，里面有几处模型名、参数和版本行为互相冲突，请补充或校正。
evals.expected_output: Uses official or primary sources to resolve version-sensitive conflicts, creates one polished note in 06_To_Classify, and includes concise Sources because external sources were used.
expectations: The final note is written to 06_To_Classify.
Official or primary sources are preferred for version-sensitive claims.
Conflicting or outdated claims are corrected instead of left as generic uncertainty.
External findings are incorporated into the note as corrected facts, constraints, comparisons, or caveats rather than merely appended as links.
Sources appears because external sources were used.
Sources contains only the official or primary external references used, not the temporary 00_Inbox input file.
The result remains a personal knowledge note rather than an academic report.

evals.name: frontmatter_uses_obsidian_markdown_contract
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/AI Agent 设计摘录.md 整理成 Obsidian 成品笔记。frontmatter 按 Obsidian Markdown 来，不要发明复杂字段体系。
evals.expected_output: Creates one polished note in 06_To_Classify with valid YAML frontmatter, using only useful properties and following obsidian-markdown syntax.
expectations: The final note is written to 06_To_Classify.
The agent reads or follows obsidian-markdown as the syntax contract.
Frontmatter is valid YAML.
Only useful properties are added; no large invented schema is required.
Frontmatter does not include source, sources, origin, or related values pointing to 00_Inbox raw inputs.
Internal links and embeds use Obsidian syntax.

evals.name: successful_curation_deletes_source
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/Stable Diffusion 参数笔记.md 整理成成品笔记，整理完顺手把原文件删掉。
evals.expected_output: Creates the note in 06_To_Classify, then moves the Inbox source to the Obsidian trash after output validation and deletion preflights pass.
expectations: The final note is written to 06_To_Classify.
vault_integrity check --strict and delete-check --strict pass before source deletion.
The raw input is moved to the Obsidian trash without permanent deletion.
The final note does not preserve a durable link to the soon-to-be-deleted 00_Inbox raw input.
The final response lists the deleted source.
The curation output is still completed if the source path is specified.

evals.name: direct_classification_out_of_scope
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/数据库索引优化.md 整理好后直接放进 02_Knowledge/Database。
evals.expected_output: Creates one polished note in 06_To_Classify and does not directly classify into 02_Knowledge, because this skill always routes finished notes through 06_To_Classify.
expectations: The output goes to 06_To_Classify even if the user suggests 02_Knowledge.
The note is not classified into 01_Projects, 02_Knowledge, or 03_Resources by this skill.
The Inbox input is moved to the Obsidian trash after all deletion preflights pass.
The final response can mention that later human classification is expected.
The source deletion is reported.

evals.name: non_curation_request_should_not_trigger
evals.prompt: 帮我重命名 02_Knowledge/AIGC 里的几篇重复笔记，并移动到更合适的文件夹。
evals.expected_output: This skill should not be used; the request is vault organization/maintenance, not raw-material curation into one finished 06_To_Classify note.
expectations: The skill does not apply to folder reorganization or note moving tasks.
No curated note is created in 06_To_Classify.
The task should be handled by a vault maintenance workflow instead.

evals.name: faithful_compression_preserves_unique_units
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/摄影布光课程摘录.md 整理成一篇可复用的 Obsidian 成品笔记。里面有很多重复口语、闲聊和转写错误，但也有具体灯位、参数、失败案例和现场判断。
evals.expected_output: Creates one dense but readable note in 06_To_Classify that compresses repeated low-value material while preserving unique lighting setups, parameters, examples, failure cases, and practical judgments.
expectations: The final note is shorter and cleaner than the raw transcript when the source contains repeated chatter or capture noise.
The agent does not preserve filler merely to avoid compression.
Unique high-value units such as setup diagrams, parameters, failure modes, practical caveats, and examples are retained or intentionally merged.
Long reusable details are moved into appropriate tables, folded callouts, code blocks, diagrams, or appendix-like sections instead of being deleted.
The output does not cite 00_Inbox transcript paths as durable note provenance.
The note remains usable without reopening the raw source.

evals.name: language_polish_and_search_enrichment
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/粗糙翻译-API参数说明.md 整理成一篇 Obsidian 成品笔记。原文有机器翻译腔、几处参数名可能过时、还有一些上下文缺失，请必要时查官方来源补齐。
evals.expected_output: Creates one polished note in 06_To_Classify with natural Chinese prose, corrected or contextualized version-sensitive claims, concise Sources when official references are used, and improved explanatory value beyond a plain summary.
expectations: The final Chinese prose is natural, precise, and free of obvious machine-translation grammar.
The agent rewrites awkward source phrasing instead of preserving it mechanically.
Official or primary sources are used when they materially resolve outdated parameter names, version behavior, or missing context.
Search findings are integrated into the main explanation as corrections, constraints, comparisons, or caveats.
Temporary 00_Inbox input paths are not included in frontmatter, body links, wikilinks, or Sources.
The final note improves the source's accuracy and usability rather than only shortening it.

evals.name: inbox_inputs_are_transient_not_sources
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/重复资料-A.md 和 00_Inbox/重复资料-B.md 整理成一篇成品笔记。Inbox 原文整理后会删除，不要在成品里引用它们。
evals.expected_output: Creates one polished note in 06_To_Classify that uses the Inbox files as transient raw material while omitting 00_Inbox paths from frontmatter, body links, wikilinks, and Sources.
expectations: The final note is written to 06_To_Classify.
The note can use and merge the content from both specified Inbox files.
The note does not include frontmatter fields such as source, sources, origin, or related that point to 00_Inbox files.
The note does not add Markdown links or wikilinks to 00_Inbox files.
Sources is omitted unless external web or primary sources were actually used, and never lists the Inbox inputs.
Both Inbox inputs are moved to the Obsidian trash only after all deletion preflights pass.
The final response reports the created note path and deleted inputs.

evals.name: inbound_reference_blocks_source_deletion
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/仍被其他笔记链接的资料.md 整理成成品笔记，但 delete-check --strict 发现它有入链。
evals.expected_output: Creates no destructive side effect when the deletion preflight finds inbound links: the raw source remains in Inbox and the failed check is reported.
expectations: The source is not deleted or moved to trash.
The final response identifies the failed deletion preflight.
No permanent deletion is attempted.

evals.name: failed_curation_does_not_delete_inbox_source
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/损坏的输入.md 整理成成品笔记，但写入 06_To_Classify 失败。
evals.expected_output: Reports the failed output and leaves the Inbox source untouched.
expectations: The agent does not delete or modify the source after an output failure.
The final response clearly says that the source was retained.
No deletion is attempted.

evals.name: independent_topics_split_into_multiple_outputs
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/镜头焦段速查.md 和 00_Inbox/色彩管理故障排查.md 整理成知识笔记。两份材料没有共同的读者问题。
evals.expected_output: Creates two independently titled notes in 06_To_Classify because the source units answer separate retrieval questions.
expectations: Each output has a coherent standalone title and body.
The material is not forced into one broad mixed-topic note.
Both outputs and any required local visual assets validate before source deletion.
The final response lists both created note paths and the deleted source paths.

evals.name: same_topic_conflict_merges_with_context
evals.prompt: 把 00_Inbox/Resolve 色彩管理旧版笔记.md 和 00_Inbox/Resolve 色彩管理新版笔记.md 整理成知识笔记。两份材料对同一个设置有冲突说明。
evals.expected_output: Creates one note that compares, scopes, or corrects the version-specific conflict instead of splitting one reader question into separate notes.
expectations: The output makes the version boundary or correction explicit.
The conflict is not silently discarded.
The final note remains organized around one retrieval question.

evals.name: material_visual_failure_retains_sources
evals.prompt: 整理 00_Inbox/界面操作截图教程.md。截图是理解步骤的必要证据，但本地化附件失败。
evals.expected_output: Does not delete the raw source notes when a material visual cannot be retained in a valid local output asset.
expectations: The final response identifies the visual-asset failure.
No raw source is moved to the Obsidian trash.
No decorative substitute image is generated.
